utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Prague) is given; travel_dates (2024-06-20 to 2024-06-24) are specific; transportation includes airline name, departure airport, flight class, cost, and currency; accommodation includes property details, star and guest ratings, total cost, and currency; activities include activity name, type, cost, and currency; additional_services include service type, restaurant name, price, currency, and dietary accommodations; total_budget includes numeric value and currency. Therefore, all items are present and fully detailed.
